resources.string: Album art, lyrics, and playback controls will appear here after music starts.
Lyrics are unavailable for this session.
View logs, service status, and system info
This will hide the entry point and stop recording debug logs. You can re-enable it by tapping the version number 7 times again.
Use true black background in dark mode

To function, Capsulyric needs to read your notifications.

We Promise:
1. No Internet Access: This app does not connect to the net.
2. No Data Collection: No personal data is stored or transmitted.
3. Local Only: All processing happens on your device.

Note: We are not responsible for the behavior of other apps.
Enabling this may increase battery usage and cause message delays. Continue?

This mode uses 'Bluetooth Car Lyric' protocol.

1. Supports QQ Music, Xiaomi Music and NetEase Music.
2. NetEase: Enable 'Car Bluetooth Lyric' in Settings -> Tools.
3. QQ Music: Enable 'Car Bluetooth Lyric' in QPlay Settings.
4. Grant 'Notification Access' to this app.
Required to post live lyric notifications
Hide all network-related features and block update checks, community feed, and online lyric requests
Manage cached online lyrics and remote images
Temporarily disconnects XMSF network when sending notifications to bypass the system whitelist (Requires Shizuku)
Choose how long XMSF stays offline when bypassing the Super Island whitelist (Requires Shizuku)
Disconnect briefly while posting the notification
Keep XMSF offline until the current track finishes
Automatically recommend the current media app when entering rule settings
Live notifications for status bar lyrics, supporting Capsule and Super Island modes.
Choose the background color mode used by the One UI live capsule.
Configure how to parse notifications from music apps
Use Media Notification (Notification Bar/Car Music) Lyrics
Tap FAB to add a parser rule
Automatically score all providers and choose the best match
Use original playback info for online matching
Skip title parsing and use raw title/artist from the player when searching online lyrics
Online lyrics work better without notification lyrics
If online lyrics are your main source, it is recommended to turn off media notification lyrics to avoid static text or duplicate triggers. Do you want to turn it off now?
Only QQ Music and NetEase online lyrics currently expose translation data.
Only QQ Music and NetEase online lyrics currently expose romanization data.
Receive translation fields when the active Lyricon provider sends them.
Receive romanization or secondary lyric fields when the active Lyricon provider sends them.
Fetch timestamped lyrics from multiple online sources (Kugou/Netease/LrcApi)
Check for new versions on app launch
Choose the kind of updates you want to receive. Experiment can be enabled from Laboratory.
Preview and Experiment updates may include unfinished changes and are not recommended if you prefer maximum stability.
Q: What’s the difference between update channels?

• Stable: Receives official releases only. Best for everyday use.

• Preview: Receives preview releases first, and later moves on to the matching Stable release. Best when you want new features earlier with lower risk.

• Experiment: Receives experimental builds from the testing branch only. Updates arrive earlier, but changes may be incomplete or unstable. This option appears after enabling Receive Test Builds in Laboratory.
Show the default music app icon
Translation and romanization only apply when the selected lyric source receives them; otherwise lyrics are shown.
Replaces Live Update with Xiaomi Super Island template for lyric notification.
Keep the album cover in the left island area in Full Lyrics mode.
Switch between Material Design and Miuix UI. App will restart.
Displays static text only. Prevents ALL scrolling, regardless of lyric type.
Use album cover color for lyrics, song title, capsule edge, and progress bar in Super Island.
Allow dragging Super Island to share lyrics.
Automatically remove from recents when app goes to background
Show a preview of the previous screen when swiping back. Restart to apply.
Extract accent color from your wallpaper (Android 12+). App will restart.
Apply frosted glass blur on album art background of the media card.
Tap %1$d more times to enable diagnostics
Full Offline Mode is enabled. Network actions are blocked.
Q: How to add parser rules for my music app?

Follow these steps to add a rule:

 1. Enable App Settings: Ensure features like "Notification Lyrics", "Media Notification Lyrics", or "Car Bluetooth Lyrics" are enabled in your music app.

 2. Add Parser Rule: Go to the Parser Rules page and select "Add Music App".
 • Fill in the app name and package name.
 • If "Recommend current playing app" is enabled, click the button to auto-fill.

 3. Configure Parsing:
 • Enable "Media Notification Lyrics".
 • Select the "Separator" and "Order" based on how the notification looks.

 4. Restart to Apply: Save the rule, remove the music app from recents, and restart it.

 Note: If the app lacks these features, try the SuperLyric/Lyric Getter options or "Online Lyrics" as a backup.
Q: Supported Dynamic Island Solutions and Requirements?

A: This application provides two distinct lyric display solutions:

 1. Native Live Update
 - Prerequisites: Android 16+ or HyperOS 3.0.300+.
 - Implementation: Utilizes native system APIs. The system automatically maintains a capsule state in the status bar while the app is in the background, ensuring high efficiency.

 2. Xiaomi Super Island
 - Prerequisites: All HyperOS versions.
 - Implementation: Employs proprietary protocols of Xiaomi Music. Must be manually enabled via "Send Xiaomi Super Island Notification" in settings.
 - Whitelist Bypass Methods:
 • Root Access: Recommended to use modules such as HyperCeiler to eliminate system-level application restrictions.
 • Non-Root: Requires Shizuku authorization and enabling the "Bypass Xiaomi Super Island Whitelist" feature. (Note: This may result in intermittent increases in power consumption or notification latency.)
Q: How do I configure online lyrics?

A: Online lyrics are useful when notification lyrics are unavailable, incomplete, or when you need more accurate timed lyrics.

 1. Open the current music app rule on the Parser Rules page.

 2. Enable "Use Online Lyrics API".

 3. If the player reports more accurate song title and artist data, enable "Use Raw Metadata for Online Matching".

 4. It is recommended to keep "Smart Fetch" enabled so the app can choose a better result automatically. If you prefer manual control, disable Smart Fetch and adjust "Online Lyrics Priority" yourself.

 5. If one song keeps matching incorrectly, open "Online Lyrics Debug", fill in a custom match title or artist for the current song, then run "Ignore Cache and Force Refresh".
Q: Why are the online lyric search results incorrect?

A: Online lyrics rely on the current track matching information. If the player reports incomplete title or artist data, or if the title contains extra tags such as Live, Remix, cover, show names, or bracketed suffixes, the match may be wrong.

Try the following:

1. Open "Online Lyrics Debug" and check the actual match title and artist currently in use.

2. Manually fill in a custom match title or artist for the current song.

3. Save it, then run "Ignore Cache and Force Refresh" once.

4. If the result is still wrong, check whether "Use Raw Metadata for Online Matching" should be enabled.
Q: Why did the lyrics not change after I edited the custom match info?

A: Custom match information affects future online searches and cache hits, but it does not automatically replace results that are already being displayed.

If nothing changes after editing it, follow this order:

1. Save the custom match information for the current song first.

2. In "Online Lyrics Debug", run "Ignore Cache and Force Refresh" once.

3. If the result still does not change, the displayed lyric may still be coming from old cache data.

4. In that case, clear the lyric cache entry for this song and fetch it again.

Note: Custom matching supports partial override. If only the title or only the artist is filled in, the blank field will be completed automatically using the original playback information.
Q: How do I clear the online lyric cache?

A: The app provides a dedicated "Cache Management" page for viewing and clearing online lyric cache entries.

 Available actions include:

 1. View the number of cached lyric entries, their total size, and the last update time.

 2. Delete a single lyric cache entry.

 3. Clear all lyric cache.

 4. Clear image cache as well if needed.

 If online lyric results never update, or if you already corrected the match information but still see the old result, it is recommended to delete the cache entry for that song first and fetch it again.
Q: How to access Cache Management and Lyric Debugging?

A: You can access the Diagnostics Tool by repeatedly tapping the "Internal Development Number" (or "Commit Hash") in the About section of Settings. Both Cache Management and Online Lyric Debugging pages are located within the Diagnostics Tool. Note that the custom matching feature is found inside the "Online Lyric Debugging" page.
Q: Does Full Offline Mode affect online lyrics?

A: Yes. After "Full Offline Mode" is enabled, all online lyric requests are disabled. Update checks and other network-dependent content are also blocked.\n\n If you want to use online lyrics, please turn off Full Offline Mode first.
Q: Troubleshooting: Lyrics/Island Not Displayed After Configuration?

A: Please perform the following standardized diagnostic steps:

 1. Credential Verification: Ensure "Notification Access" is granted. It is recommended to lock the application in the recents menu and enable autostart to prevent process termination.

 2. Playback Source Mechanism:
 - Mainstream Music Apps (QQ/Netease/Xiaomi, etc.): Verify "Car/Bluetooth Lyrics" is enabled. Some versions only broadcast data when a Bluetooth or wired headset is connected.
 - Apple Music: Due to its closed-source nature, the SuperLyric module within the LSPosed environment is required for data relay.

 3. Compatibility Verification:
 - Live Update Mode: Systems below HyperOS 3.0.300 lack the necessary underlying APIs for native capsule display.
 - Super Island Mode: Without proper Root patches or Shizuku authorization bypass, the system will intercept dynamic notifications from unauthorized applications.

 4. Data Integrity: Online lyric scraping may fail to display content due to API latency or copyright restrictions.

 If the issue persists, please export a diagnostic ZIP via the tool and submit a ticket via the feedback page.
Q: Why does the home page say "Cannot connect to service"?

A: This is usually because the system automatically revoked permissions.

 Reason: Some systems limit the duration of "Notification Access" authorization.
 Solution: Please go to system settings and re-grant Notification Access to this app.
Q: None of the above solved my problem. What should I do?

A: Please submit an Issue on the feedback page. - Recommended: GitHub Issues (Highest efficiency). - Alternative: WPS Form (May require login). Important: When submitting feedback, please attach Logs to help us troubleshoot.
Q: Log Retrieval and Export Procedure?

A: Please follow the standardized procedure:

 1. Activate Diagnostics Tool
 - Debug Version: Direct access available via the Log Console on the main screen.
 - Release Version: Navigate to the "About" section and tap the version number or "Commit Hash" 7 times to unlock the entry point.

 2. Export ZIP Package
 Within the log interface, select the share/export icon. You can specify a timeframe for data capture. The application will aggregate environment context and system logs into a ZIP file. Please ensure this file is attached when submitting a GitHub Issue or feedback form.
Use a custom Super Island expanded layout with a horizontal progress bar and three media controls for testing.
Extract album art color for notification progress bar
Delay before hiding notification after playback stops
Based on Live Update and Xiaomi SuperIsland. Experience dynamic lyrics in your status bar.
⚠️ Community Reported\nLive Update works on this ROM based on user reports, but the developer has not officially tested it. Stability may vary.
⚠️ Untested System\nAndroid 16 detected. Live Update should work in theory, but there are no reports for this ROM yet.
⚠️ Limited Support\nNative Live Update is unavailable on this version. Xiaomi Super Island notifications will be enabled by default.
❌ System Unsupported\nThis system is not yet supported. Dynamic lyrics require Android 16+ or HyperOS 3.0+.
🔒 Privacy First\nThis app runs entirely locally. Internet access is ONLY used if you explicitly enable "Online Lyrics". We never collect or transmit your personal data.
Required to read lyrics from music apps.
Required to display the lyrics capsule.
Allow background running to keep lyrics alive.
To broadcast lyrics, you must enable "Bluetooth/Car Lyrics" in your music app.
1. Connect a Bluetooth audio device first.\n2. Go to Me -> Menu (Top Right 3-lines) -> Settings.\n3. Find and enable Car Bluetooth Lyrics.
1. Connect a Bluetooth audio device first.\n2. Go to Menu (Top Left) -> Settings -> General.\n3. Find and enable External Device Bluetooth Lyrics.
1. Go to Me -> Menu (Top Right 3-lines) -> General Settings.\n2. Enable Notification Bar Lyrics.

1. Requires Root (Magisk/KernelSU).
2. Install LSPosed framework.
3. Install the SuperLyric module.
4. Enable the module for Apple Music.
My app is not in this list?
Lyrics displayed elegantly in the status bar area, inspired by Dynamic Island.
Support for "Car Bluetooth" lyrics from major music apps, plus online fallback.
Adjust colors, icons, and behavior to match your style.
Required on this device to keep service running.
No whitelisted media sessions found. Check Parser Rules or play music in a supported app.
Cannot open %1$s. This media session does not provide an app entry, and no launcher activity was found.
Could not open %1$s from the media session. Opened the app home instead.
Cannot open %1$s. The app entry exists, but launch failed: %2$s
Shows a popup without opening the app
Manage experimental features and test toggles
When enabled, the Notification Style setting in Personalization will show the Advanced Style (Beta) option
Show controls for tuning the left and right Super Island text limits in Personalization.
Show the Experiment channel and receive experimental builds from the testing branch.
When enabled, the Desktop Lyrics entry will appear in Personalization Settings
Choose the preferred community feed source. If it fails, the app automatically falls back to the other source.

This style is still experimental, and some devices may require root to display it properly. After enabling it, go to Personalization Settings and switch the notification style to Advanced Style (Beta) yourself.
Inspect the final result from each online lyric API
Fetch and fully dump QQ Music and Netease lyric extras
Ignore Cache and Force Online Refresh
This attempt used title cleanup fallback
No cached lyric for the current song
Enter at least a title or an artist
Saved current song match info. Blank fields will automatically fall back to the original playback info
Cleared the current song\'s custom match and related lyric cache
This result came from lyric cache
Switched to %1$s and refreshed lyric cache
Switched to %1$s and wrote lyric cache
This result is unavailable and cannot be selected
Includes remote image cache from changelogs
This will delete both lyric cache and image cache. This cannot be undone.
No lyric cache entries are currently available
Default is Error to reduce background overhead
This will permanently delete all logs.
Show a draggable floating lyrics overlay on screen
Show floating lyrics on screen, supports minimal and expanded modes
Display current album art on the left of lyrics
Add stroke effect to improve legibility
Add a subtle dark background behind text in minimal state
Automatically use dominant color extracted from album art
Fetching announcements and votes from the remote feed
